titleStmt.title: SII 26.618: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 618. (A.R. No. 587 of 1909.) AḌIGOPPULA, PALNAD TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab fixed into the wall of the Āñjanēya temple.

It states that Yallappa, grandson of Pullānāyani of [Pāḍavalli] belonging to Alugucharla-gōtra built a central shrine along with a square court-yard to god Hanumanta of Aḍigoppu, erected a lamp-pillar and made a grant of wet lands of sowing capacity of 3 tūmus as sarvamānya, for the worship and food-offerings to the same deity, for the merit of his father Tippānāyani and mother Sarvamma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmā .
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śa
kava¨rṣaṁbulu 1532 Aguneṁṭi saumyanāma saṁvvatsa
ra kā¨rttika śu 11 lu . Aluguca¨rla gōtrōdbhavulayina
pāḍavalli pullānāyinigāri pautṛlayina tippānā
yinigāri putṛlayina yallappaṁgāru tama taṁḍriṁ
gāru tippānāyiniṁgārikiṁnni tama talliṁgā(ṁ)
ru sarvammaṁgārikiṁnni puṇyamugānu Aḍigopphu
la hanumaṁtta tiruvaḷiki dēvuḷamunnu cavutarā
nuṁnnu kaṭṭiṁcci kaṁbhamu yettiṁcci nityanaivēdyukaṭṭa
ḷḷaku grāmānaku paḍamaṭa piṁnnanūṁtivāṁgu
paḍamaṭi voḍḍu māḍugula dōvaku dakṣaṇaṁ muttu
mu vittanāla kṣētramu sarvamānyaṁgā yicci Ācaṁddrā
¨rka sthāyigānu nilipenu . yī kṣētrānaku Āchēdanaśēśi
nā bēḍige gonnanu telaṁgāvārairā gaṁggalō gōbrāṁ
hmaṇṇi vadhiṁccina pāpānaṁbōduru turukavārai rā
makkālō paṁddiṁgōsina pāpānaṁ bōduru śrī .
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ . para
dattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavēt . śrīśrīśrī
jēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 26.618 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
